name: Do delayed back pain after ladder fall at work count as injury?
description: Yes, delayed symptoms qualify if doctor connects to fall.

mainEntity.name: Do delayed back pain after ladder fall at work count as injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, delayed symptoms qualify if doctor connects to fall.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, if medically linked to the fall**—Utah/Idaho recognize aggravation claims.[1][8]

Symptoms can emerge days/weeks later; doctor nexus opinion key.

- Get MRI/specialist eval.
- No 'accident' needed if work caused it.

Document timeline precisely.

Lawyers prove causation via experts.
